description: Phase 7d-C: permissions granted to the local `settings` window served from osl-gate://localhost/settings. This is a trusted local origin (custom scheme, not discord.com), so it gets the broad management surface — passwords, recovery phrase, identity, whitelist mutation, scope burn — that the Discord-origin main webview no longer has. Distinct from `password-gate-capability` (which is verify-only for the boot gate page) and from `main-capability` (which only sees Discord-message operations). Add new commands here when the settings window needs them; do NOT add password / recovery / identity commands to main-capability.
